title: Linux Suspicious Cron Job Content
description: Detects cron job entries containing suspicious patterns such as downloading payloads, piping to shell, or encoding commands typically used for persistence.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*/etc/cron*' or msg like '*/var/spool/cron*')) and ((msg like '*curl|sh*' or msg like '*wget|sh*' or msg like '*curl|bash*' or msg like '*wget|bash*' or msg like '*base64 -d*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate automation scripts using curl piped to shell
